objective: Integrate Symphony orchestration patterns and Kilo Code orchestration patterns into codex-orch-unified.

changes.summary: Rewrote the design document to map Symphony workflow, workspace, tracker, retry, token, and lifecycle-hook patterns plus Kilo delegation, skills, and todo concepts onto the swarm runtime.
Added an example workflow contract with YAML front matter covering GitHub tracker settings, polling, workspace isolation, lifecycle hooks, agent settings, delegation modes, skills, and todo tracking.
Implemented constrained WORKFLOW.md parsing, environment variable indirection with fallbacks, validation, typed workflow config normalization, and hot-reload file watching.
Implemented issue-to-workspace mapping, identifier sanitization, project-root containment validation, on-demand workspace creation, and timeout-bounded lifecycle hook execution.
Added a normalized IssueTrackerAdapter contract, a GraphQL-backed Linear adapter, and an explicit GitHub adapter stub.
Implemented capped exponential backoff scheduling using delay = min(10000 * 2^(attempt-1), maxRetryBackoffMs).
Added session-level and aggregate token tracking helpers with delta and absolute recording support.
Integrated stall detection, workspace safety validation, task/session token tracking, research and ensemble token accounting, and round token totals.
Extended RoundSummary with tokenTotals so round summaries can report token usage.

details: TypeScript compilation succeeded with tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json.

outcomes: The swarm engine now exposes configurable stall detection through SWARM_STALL_TIMEOUT_MS.
Round summaries now include per-round token totals and aggregate token metadata.
Workflow, workspace, retry, tracker, and token modules are independently importable.
